headline: At $499, Apple's M3-powered iPad Air is a good deal
summary: Apple's M3-powered iPad Air is available for $499. This deal offers significant savings despite recent price increases. The 128GB model is highlighted as a strong recommendation.

headline: The best July 4th sales we found so far
summary: July 4th sales continue after Prime Day. Many familiar tech deals are still available. Best Buy is among retailers offering significant discounts.

headline: WhatsApp is launching usernames: here's how to reserve yours
summary: WhatsApp will introduce usernames later this year. This allows adding contacts without sharing your phone number. The feature aims to enhance user privacy on the platform.

headline: Lawmakers want to ban AI companies from selling your health data
summary: A new proposal aims to ban selling Americans' health and location data. This includes information shared with AI chatbots like ChatGPT. Senators Warren and Scanlon are introducing the "Health and Location Data Protection Act."

headline: Steam Machine Companion Cube Canceled Because Dbrand Didn't Ask Valve for Permission
summary: Dbrand canceled its Steam Machine Companion Cube enclosure. The cancellation is due to not obtaining permission from Valve. This affects customers who pre-ordered the accessory.

headline: '60fps Feels Like a Bridge Too far' — Tech Experts Cast Doubt on Those GTA 6 Quality and Performance Mode 'Leaks'
summary: Rumors of GTA 6 having a 60fps mode are likely false. Tech experts express skepticism about performance mode leaks. Don't believe everything you read regarding Rockstar's upcoming game.

headline: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild Drops to an All-Time Low Price
summary: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild is now at an all-time low price. This rare Nintendo first-party discount is available for Switch owners. Players can secure significant savings on the acclaimed title.

headline: Unionized Xbox Workers Demand Layoff Protections Ahead of Expected Cuts to Microsoft's Gaming Business
summary: Unionized Xbox workers are seeking layoff protections. This comes amidst anticipated significant cuts to Microsoft's gaming division. Workers aim to secure their jobs during restructuring.

headline: New 'No 10 North' plan will rebalance power in Britain, Burnham promises
summary: Andy Burnham proposes a 'No 10 North' plan for Britain. His devolution strategy aims to rebalance power and drive growth. Burnham, a potential future PM, champions local development.

headline: Henry Zeffman: Andy Burnham offers a blueprint for his premiership
summary: Andy Burnham presented a vision for his potential premiership. He outlined a general sense of his future leadership. Specific policy details were not extensively provided in his address.

headline: Resident doctors in England accept pay deal and end strikes
summary: Resident doctors in England have accepted a new pay deal. This agreement concludes a three-year dispute with the government. Multiple rounds of strikes have now officially ended.

headline: Mum rescued from Venezuela rubble with newborn baby tells BBC how he helped her survive
summary: A mother and her newborn baby were miraculously rescued from Venezuela rubble. The 18-day-old baby, Juan David, is a symbol of hope. Their survival follows devastating earthquakes in the region.
